_comment: [IT version: deploy_access.example.it.json] Copy this file to deploy_access.json (at the project root, OUTSIDE git) ONLY if the user asked you to persist server access for future tasks.php uploads/updates. Otherwise ask for credentials fresh each time and don't write them to disk at all. Each top-level key = one connection/site.

_schema.protocol: sftp (preferred, encrypted) or ftp — flag plain ftp to the user as a hosting limitation
_schema.password: leave empty and ask fresh if you'd rather not persist it
_schema.remote_path: server path where tasks.php (and its auto-created cowork_tasks.db) should live, e.g. /public_html/cowork/
